indication: OPDIVO (nivolumab), in combination with ipilimumab, is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic ESCC, with tumour cell PD-L1 expression >= 1% as determined by a validated test, and no prior systemic therapy for metastatic ESCC.
description: Health Canada approved nivolumab, in combination with ipilimuab, for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable or metastatic ESCC, with tumour cell PD-L1 expression >= 1% as determined by a validated test, and no prior systemic therapy for metastatic ESCC.
raw_cancer_type: unresectable or metastatic esophageal squamous cell carcinoma (ESCC)

document.name: Opdivo (nivolumab) [product monograph]. HC.
